creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
wxs         2008-12-03 20:34:46 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    .                    MOVED 
    mail                 Makefile 
  Removed files:
    mail/libspf-alt      Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    mail/libspf-alt/files patch-bin::spf_example::spf_example.c 
                          patch-bin::spf_example::spf_example_2mx.c 
                          patch-config::ltmain.sh 
  Log:
  Remove libspf-alt.  It has been superceded by mail/libspf2 a long time
  ago, has been marked deprecated since January 2005 and is not used by
  any other port in the tree.
  
  PR:             ports/128322
  Submitted by:   Daniel Roethlisberger <daniel@roe.ch> (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1713    +2 -1      ports/MOVED
  1.935     +0 -1      ports/mail/Makefile
  1.11      +0 -35     ports/mail/libspf-alt/Makefile (dead)
  1.3       +0 -3      ports/mail/libspf-alt/distinfo (dead)
  1.2       +0 -17     ports/mail/libspf-alt/files/patch-bin::spf_example::spf_example.c (dead)
  1.2       +0 -17     ports/mail/libspf-alt/files/patch-bin::spf_example::spf_example_2mx.c (dead)
  1.2       +0 -45     ports/mail/libspf-alt/files/patch-config::ltmain.sh (dead)
  1.2       +0 -6      ports/mail/libspf-alt/pkg-descr (dead)
  1.4       +0 -23     ports/mail/libspf-alt/pkg-plist (dead)
